prompt: Ok great, that fixed the TypeScript error. Can you record that decision so we have a reference if we hit this again? The issue was that we had to use `satisfies` instead of a type assertion because of how the generic inference works with the Zod schema.
assertions: The CLI `decisions create` command was invoked to create the record (not just a manual file write)
A decision record file was created in the decisions records directory
The record's Context section describes the Zod generic inference problem and why type assertions failed
The record's Decision section explains the `satisfies` keyword approach and includes a relevant code snippet
The record's Consequences section has concrete bullet points about the trade-offs
No HTML comment placeholder blocks remain in the final file
The user is told the path to the new record file
